channel.title: renegadescienceteacher TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from renegadescienceteacher

item.title: Dumping drafts from 4 years on this app. Be sure you're following me everywhere else!

item.title: #stitch with @Forrest Valkai It's been a wild ride, yall. Thank you for everything! #science #biology #bekind #progress #human #love #life #learnontiktok
item.description: #stitch with @Forrest Valkai It's been a wild ride, yall. Thank you for everything! #science #biology #bekind #progress #human #love #life #learnontiktok

item.title: What the hell just happened?
item.description: What the hell just happened?

item.title: I'm not one for conspiracy theories, but I'd bet money that pop-up was part of the deal. TikTok 2.0 if fixing to be WILD, yall.
item.description: I'm not one for conspiracy theories, but I'd bet money that pop-up was part of the deal. TikTok 2.0 if fixing to be WILD, yall.

item.title: #stitch with @CBC News Cooked doesn't even begin to cover it. Be sure to tag me in any protest announcements around Oklahoma! #science #biology #life #gender #anthropology #medicine #lgbt
item.description: #stitch with @CBC News Cooked doesn't even begin to cover it. Be sure to tag me in any protest announcements around Oklahoma! #science #biology #life #gender #anthropology #medicine #lgbt

item.title: Here's a clip from my talk at CSICon last year titled "How to Teach Evolution to a Creationist". What a stellar convention! (Figuratively and literally. There were some cool astrophysics talks.) @Center for Inquiry #science #biology #evolution #wonder #b
item.description: Here's a clip from my talk at CSICon last year titled "How to Teach Evolution to a Creationist". What a stellar convention! (Figuratively and literally. There were some cool astrophysics talks.) @Center for Inquiry #science #biology #evolution #wonder #b

item.title: Here's a shortened clip of my speech at CSICon last year. Get excited about science with me! #science #biology #life #space #chemistry #beauty #nature #learnontiktok
item.description: Here's a shortened clip of my speech at CSICon last year. Get excited about science with me! #science #biology #life #space #chemistry #beauty #nature #learnontiktok

item.title: Thoughts and prayers. 🙏
item.description: Thoughts and prayers. 🙏

item.title: Knowledge is power. Don't let them make you act stupid. #science #biology #safety #protection #thisiswhatdemocracylookslike
item.description: Knowledge is power. Don't let them make you act stupid. #science #biology #safety #protection #thisiswhatdemocracylookslike

item.title: You can order these cards or print your own using the free pdfs from the Immigrant Legal Resource Center. #freedom #constitution #America #immigrant #resistance
item.description: You can order these cards or print your own using the free pdfs from the Immigrant Legal Resource Center. #freedom #constitution #America #immigrant #resistance

item.title: It's an honor to get to advocate for more accurate and inclusive research at such a critical time. Fortunately, science isn't like American politics. You can't buy truth. #science #biology #biomed #binary #LGBT #lgbtqia #life #human #truth
item.description: It's an honor to get to advocate for more accurate and inclusive research at such a critical time. Fortunately, science isn't like American politics. You can't buy truth. #science #biology #biomed #binary #LGBT #lgbtqia #life #human #truth

item.title: They'll never catch Tommy Valkai! #theyllnevercatchtommyvalkai #shirt #scam #con #science #atheist #biology #conspiracy
item.description: They'll never catch Tommy Valkai! #theyllnevercatchtommyvalkai #shirt #scam #con #science #atheist #biology #conspiracy

item.title: #stitch with @Forrest Valkai is on YouTube Grab your popcorn, folks! We're gonna watch transphobes try to think in front of a live audience! @Nai'a 🌈💖✨️🪻 #learn #think #ask #question #science #biology #psychology #lgbt #gender #greenscreen
item.description: #stitch with @Forrest Valkai is on YouTube Grab your popcorn, folks! We're gonna watch transphobes try to think in front of a live audience! @Nai'a 🌈💖✨️🪻 #learn #think #ask #question #science #biology #psychology #lgbt #gender #greenscreen

item.title: Totally accurate depiction of evolution. 10/10. No notes. #science #biology #evolution #life #learn #human

item.title: #stitch with @Brenna Brown While you study evolution, I'll try to learn how to stop swinging my mic around. #science #biology #evolution #learn #human #evidence #truth #help
item.description: #stitch with @Brenna Brown While you study evolution, I'll try to learn how to stop swinging my mic around. #science #biology #evolution #learn #human #evidence #truth #help

item.title: Replying to @nx_nrd029 Evolution isn't really an inventor. It's just a tinkerer. #science #biology #plants #evolution #sharp #rose #cactus
item.description: Replying to @nx_nrd029 Evolution isn't really an inventor. It's just a tinkerer. #science #biology #plants #evolution #sharp #rose #cactus

item.title: These kids are so unbelievably smart and their projects are astonishing! Please continue to support them and the National STEM Festival by following @EXPLR!
item.description: These kids are so unbelievably smart and their projects are astonishing! Please continue to support them and the National STEM Festival by following @EXPLR!

item.title: The National STEM Festival is a smash hit for these young scholars! Learn more @EXPLR! #science #math #biology #chemistry #engineering #student #school #learnontiktok

item.title: It's a lot like classroom teaching, but you need new materials all the time and none of them are reusable. Probably gonna donate the noodles. 🤷‍♂️ #science #biology #staytuned #video
item.description: It's a lot like classroom teaching, but you need new materials all the time and none of them are reusable. Probably gonna donate the noodles. 🤷‍♂️ #science #biology #staytuned #video

item.title: 2 years later, and this post only seems more relevant. #onthisday #stupid #learnontiktok

item.title: HUGE thanks to @Arizona State University for having me out to record an episode of Space for Humans! Follow them over on the play-button platform if you want to learn some seriously awesome stuff about life in space! #science #stem #biology #space #life #
item.description: HUGE thanks to @Arizona State University for having me out to record an episode of Space for Humans! Follow them over on the play-button platform if you want to learn some seriously awesome stuff about life in space! #science #stem #biology #space #life #

item.title: Seriously, these are some of the laziest trap arguments of all time. Don't fall for them. #science #biology #life #human #evolution #learnontiktok
item.description: Seriously, these are some of the laziest trap arguments of all time. Don't fall for them. #science #biology #life #human #evolution #learnontiktok

item.title: TL;DW: I'm stupid, but light is neat. #science #physics #biology #light #xray #earth #space #sciencetok #learnontiktok
item.description: TL;DW: I'm stupid, but light is neat. #science #physics #biology #light #xray #earth #space #sciencetok #learnontiktok

item.title: This video doesn't even scratch the surface of what I want to say, but we don't have all day to be sad. Go find a protest! #science #biology #life #evolution #tiktokban #learnontiktok
item.description: This video doesn't even scratch the surface of what I want to say, but we don't have all day to be sad. Go find a protest! #science #biology #life #evolution #tiktokban #learnontiktok

item.title: There are only a few spots and a few days left to sign up! The 🔗 is where 🔗s always are! Sign up now and let's go on an adventure! #biology #science #life #monkey #elephant #wild #animals #jungle #adventure #letsgo
item.description: There are only a few spots and a few days left to sign up! The 🔗 is where 🔗s always are! Sign up now and let's go on an adventure! #biology #science #life #monkey #elephant #wild #animals #jungle #adventure #letsgo

item.title: This was my cold open from today's show. If you have questions or complaints about any part of it, feel free to pick up the phone. I host AXP the first Sunday of every month and The Line every Sunday (including in the evening after AXP). #science #skeptic
item.description: This was my cold open from today's show. If you have questions or complaints about any part of it, feel free to pick up the phone. I host AXP the first Sunday of every month and The Line every Sunday (including in the evening after AXP). #science #skeptic
